all.en: This proposal outlines a plan to expand production capacity at the northern plant.
all.zh: 本提案說明擴充北區工廠產能的計畫。

all.en: Recent demand forecasts indicate sustained growth across three product families.
all.zh: 近期需求預測顯示三大產品線維持成長態勢。

all.en: Existing lines are operating at ninety percent utilization on average each month.
all.zh: 現有產線每月平均稼動率達百分之九十。

all.en: Order backlog has lengthened from two weeks to nearly six weeks since last quarter.
all.zh: 訂單待出貨已自兩週延長為自上一季近六週。

all.en: Without additional capacity, we risk losing strategic customers to competitors.
all.zh: 若不擴充產能，恐將流失策略客戶至競爭對手。

all.en: The proposed expansion adds two assembly lines and one packaging station.
all.zh: 提案的擴充包含新增兩條組裝線與一座包裝工作站。

all.en: Equipment lead times range between sixteen and twenty four weeks from suppliers.
all.zh: 供應商設備交期介於十六至二十四週。

all.en: Layout drawings have been prepared and reviewed by the engineering committee.
all.zh: 佈置圖已完成並經工程委員會審查。

all.en: Utilities such as power and compressed air require modest upgrades to support load.
all.zh: 電力與壓縮空氣等公用設施需小幅升級以承載負載。

all.en: Estimated capital expenditure totals approximately four million dollars overall.
all.zh: 預估資本支出總計約四百萬美元。

all.en: Annual incremental revenue is projected at six to seven million dollars.
all.zh: 預估每年增加營收約六百至七百萬美元。

all.en: Payback period is calculated at roughly twenty months under base case assumptions.
all.zh: 基準情境下投資回收期約為二十個月。

all.en: Twenty five new operator positions and three supervisor roles will be created.
all.zh: 將新增二十五個操作員職缺與三個領班職位。

all.en: Training for new staff will run parallel with equipment installation activities.
all.zh: 新進員工訓練將與設備安裝作業同步進行。

all.en: Safety reviews will be conducted before any commissioning begins on the new lines.
all.zh: 新產線進入試車前將先完成安全審查。

all.en: Environmental impact assessments confirm no significant changes to emissions.
all.zh: 環境影響評估確認排放無顯著變動。

all.en: Permits required from local authorities are already in the application process.
all.zh: 向地方主管機關申請的許可已在受理中。

all.en: Risks include longer than expected supplier lead times for specialized components.
all.zh: 風險包含特殊零件供應商交期可能較預期更長。

all.en: Mitigation strategies include dual sourcing critical parts and phased commissioning.
all.zh: 因應策略包含關鍵零件雙源並進行分階段試車。

all.en: Cross functional governance will track milestones through a weekly steering meeting.
all.zh: 跨部門治理機制將透過每週指導會議追蹤里程碑。

all.en: Project completion is targeted for the end of the third quarter next year.
all.zh: 專案目標於明年第三季底完成。

all.en: Pilot production should begin two months before full ramp up activities.
all.zh: 試生產應於全面量產前兩個月開始。

all.en: Executive approval is requested by the end of this month to maintain schedule.
all.zh: 為維持時程，謹請於本月底前核准。

all.en: Detailed financial models and risk registers are attached for committee review.
all.zh: 詳細財務模型與風險登錄表已附上供委員會審閱。

all.en: Sensitivity analysis tests the proposal against a ten percent demand downside scenario.
all.zh: 敏感度分析以需求下修百分之十的情境檢驗本提案。

all.en: Even in that scenario, payback remains under thirty months with positive returns.
all.zh: 即便於該情境下，回收期仍於三十個月內並維持正報酬。

all.en: Construction will be phased to minimize disruption to current production operations.
all.zh: 施工將分階段進行，以將對現有生產的干擾降至最低。

all.en: Noise and dust controls will be enforced throughout the installation period.
all.zh: 安裝期間將全程實施噪音與粉塵管控。

all.en: Communications with neighboring tenants will be coordinated through the property office.
all.zh: 與鄰近租戶的溝通將透過物業辦公室統一協調。

all.en: Existing employees will be offered first priority for supervisor promotion opportunities.
all.zh: 現職員工將優先獲得領班晉升機會。

all.en: A community hiring fair is planned to fill operator vacancies from local talent pools.
all.zh: 計畫舉辦社區徵才博覽會，自在地人才填補操作員職缺。

all.en: Vendor selection has been completed for two of the three major equipment categories.
all.zh: 三大設備類別中已完成兩項的供應商選定。

all.en: Contingency reserves of fifteen percent are included within the overall budget.
all.zh: 整體預算中已含百分之十五的應變準備金。

all.en: We respectfully request the executive committee endorse this proposal at the next session.
all.zh: 謹請執行委員會於下次會議中支持核可本提案。
